name: Wheat Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons honey, molasses or brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Using 1/2 cup of the extra warm water, dissolve the yeast and honey/or brown sugar or molasses. Set aside.
2. Combine the flours, add the salt, the vital wheat gluten, and shortening together.
3. Put the remainder of the 2 cups of extra warm water into the flour mixture. Stir until combined.
4. Add the yeast mixture and knead until the flour is fully incorporated and the dough is elastic.
5. Let rise for 1 1/2 hours, gently punching down when necessary.
6. Divide the dough into two parts; shape into loaves and place in greased loaf tins.
7. Let rise until doubled in size, then bake at 350°F for 40 minutes.
